description: The camera disconnects from WiFi frequently and stops recording intermittently. The device appears offline in the mobile application even though the internet connection is stable.
Battery drains in 2 hours — out of warranty
My watch battery drains completely within 3 hours of normal use.

The tablet I received does not power on at all. I tried multiple chargers over 48 hours. The box seal was completely intact when I opened it. This is a Dead on Arrival unit — I have never been able to use it.

My smartphone keeps disconnecting from WiFi every few hours since the last firmware update. Reconnecting manually every time is very frustrating. I have tried resetting network settings but the problem persists.

Two months after purchase, three vertical lines of dead pixels appeared on the screen. The lines extend from the top to the bottom of the display and are present at all times, making the laptop very difficult to use for my work. This is clearly a manufacturing defect.
The camera disconnects from WiFi frequently and stops recording intermittently. The device appears offline in the mobile application even though the internet connection is stable.

Significant water damage to home due to a storm. A tree branch fell on the roof, causing a hole and water intrusion into the master bedroom, hallway, and living room. Active roof leak, soaked carpeting, water stains, damaged drywall, and affected furniture and belongings.
